quiz.question:
Black lines up their bishop & queen.

Is there something wrong with the natural Ng1, preventing ...Bh3?

answers.text: Yes, White's queen is in trouble.

feedback.text: Excellent! ...Bg4 immediately wouldn't trap the queen (as there is Nxg4), but Black can instead start w/...Ng4 with the idea to trade off a defender of g4.

distractors.text: No, Ng1 is an excellent move.

feedback.text: That's not quite right - one of White's pieces will run into trouble after Ng1.

distractors.text: No, but there are better moves.

feedback.text: It is true that other moves (such as Kg1) are more useful, but there is something concretely wrong w/Ng1.
